meta.title: Kozijnendaal — PVC & Aluminium Windows and Doors
meta.description: Quality PVC and aluminium windows and doors. Production and installation by our own team. Get an indicative price instantly.

hero.title: Quality windows and doors across the Netherlands
hero.lead: We design, produce and install bespoke PVC and aluminium windows and doors. Craftsmanship by our own team, from measuring to final fitting.

products.title: Our systems
products.lead: Two material families, endless possibilities — matched to your home and budget.
products.pvcDesc: Excellent insulation at a sharp price. Low-maintenance and available in many colours and wood-grain foils.
products.aluDesc: Sleek, strong and slim. Ideal for large glass surfaces, sliding doors and a modern look.
products.glassP: From standard HR++ to triple glazing with extra functions.
products.colorP: White, RAL core colours and realistic wood-grain foils.

calc.title: Configure your window
calc.lead: Configure in detail and see an indicative price instantly — drawing included. Excl. installation and VAT.
calc.disclaimer: This is an indicative price and not a binding offer. The final price is provided after an on-site measurement, tailored to your situation.
calc.leadDesc: Enter your details and we'll get in touch — including a drawing and a sharp price.
calc.consent: I agree to the processing of my data for this request.
calc.success: Your request has been received — we'll contact you as soon as possible.

gallery.title: Our work
gallery.lead: A selection of recently completed projects across the Netherlands.

about.title: Craftsmanship from Zutphen
about.p1: Kozijnendaal is a family business from Zutphen, specialised in windows, doors and frames in PVC and aluminium. Since [YEAR] we have delivered custom solutions for homes and commercial premises throughout the Netherlands, from renovation to new build.
about.p2: Quality, reliability and personal contact come first. We think along with you, advise honestly and make sure every frame fits your home, wishes and budget perfectly.
about.p3: From the first measurement to final installation, we work with our own experienced team. That way we keep quality, planning and finish fully in our own hands — without subcontractors.
about.missionP: To make homes more beautiful, comfortable and energy-efficient with high-quality windows and doors, produced and installed with craftsmanship and care.
about.visionP: To become the trusted partner for windows and doors in the region and beyond, known for honest advice, clean finishing and lasting service.
about.phTeam: Team or workshop photo — recommended size: 1200×800px

services.title: Handled from A to Z
services.lead: One point of contact for the entire process.
services.s1d: We visit, measure precisely and advise you free of charge.
services.s2d: Custom production according to your configuration and specifications.
services.s3d: Professional fitting by our own experienced team.
services.s4d: Aftercare, adjustment and maintenance, also after delivery.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.lead: Calculate an indicative price today or schedule a free measurement.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Questions or a tailored quote? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.success: Thank you — your message has been sent.
contact.phMap: Google Maps will be embedded here

footer.about: Bespoke PVC and aluminium windows and doors. Production and installation by our own team, based in Zutphen.
footer.legalLine: Kozijnendaal · KVK [KVK NUMBER] · VAT [VAT NUMBER] · Zutphen, Netherlands

cookie.text: We use cookies to make the website work well and to improve it. The choice is yours.

legal.privacy1p: We collect name, email, phone and (optionally) address when you request a quote or contact us.
legal.privacy2p: We use this data solely to handle your request, send you a quote and contact you. We do not keep your data longer than necessary and do not share it with third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.privacy3p: You have the right to access, rectify, erase and object. Please contact the data controller for this.
legal.terms1p: After your request you receive a no-obligation quote. If you agree, we schedule an on-site measurement and prepare a final quote with a drawing. After your approval, production and installation start according to the agreed planning.
legal.terms2p: Unless agreed otherwise, a deposit of [PERCENT]% applies on order and the balance after delivery. Payment is due within [NUMBER] days of the invoice date.
legal.terms3p: A manufacturer's warranty applies to our windows and doors on the profile and the hardware. The exact warranty periods are stated in the warranty terms; see 'Warranty & withdrawal'.
legal.terms4p: Cancelling a custom order is not free of charge after approval, because production starts especially for you. The expected delivery time is stated in the quote and is usually [NUMBER] weeks.
legal.cookie1p: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to make the website work well and to improve it.
legal.cookie2p: We use functional cookies (necessary for operation, such as your language choice) and, with your consent, analytical cookies to measure website use. You can change your choice at any time via the cookie notice.
legal.faqA1: Delivery time depends on the product type and chosen configuration, but is usually [NUMBER] to [NUMBER] weeks after the final measurement. You always receive a concrete schedule with your quote.
legal.faqA2: Installation can be included; you choose this in the calculator and quote.
legal.faqA3: A manufacturer's warranty applies to our products. You will find the exact periods per component (profile, glass, hardware) under 'Warranty & withdrawal' and in your quote.
legal.faqQ4: Can I choose the colour myself?
legal.faqA4: Yes, white, RAL core colours and wood-grain foils are possible.
legal.faqA5: The calculator gives an indicative price; the final price follows after measuring.
legal.faqQ6: Do you work throughout the Netherlands?
legal.faqA6: Yes, we work throughout the Netherlands. Contact us with your postcode and we'll confirm the options and planning for your area.
legal.warranty1p: We offer a manufacturer's warranty on the windows, frames and doors supplied. PVC and aluminium profiles usually carry [NUMBER] years' warranty, glass and hardware [NUMBER] years, subject to normal use and maintenance. You receive the exact terms with the quote.
legal.warranty2: Right of withdrawal for custom products
legal.warranty2p: Products made to measure according to your specifications are excluded from the statutory 14-day right of withdrawal, in accordance with EU regulations. By agreeing to the quote, you acknowledge this.

pay.note: Payment page (example) — will be activated later for deposits.

calcui.pricenote: Indicative price per unit, excl. installation & VAT. The final price depends on hardware, detailing and on-site measurement.
calcui.sentMsg: ✓ Sent — we'll get in touch soon, including a drawing.
calcui.hintWit: Core colour: white, all the way through.
calcui.hintRal: Core colour of your choice from the RAL fan, coloured throughout.
calcui.hintFolie: Wood-grain foil, exterior and/or interior side.
